name: Honey Coconut Snack
recipeIngredient: 3 cups toasted whole grain cereal (wheat flake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Brush a jelly roll pan, 15x10", with margarine.
3. Heat honey and brown sugar in a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat until boiling, stirring constantly. Remove from heat.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients until well combined.
5. Spread the mixture evenly in the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 10 minutes, uncovered, stirring frequently.
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes.
8. Loosen the mixture with a metal spatula.
9. Let stand until firm, about 1 hour.
10. Store in an airtight container.
